productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's White Stripes T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite 100% cotton polo neck t-shirt with purple and black stripes, ribbed collar, branded buttons on a placket with purple lining and pocket on left chestFittingRegularWash care Wash in cold water of upto 30 degrees Use mild detergent Avoid beating and twisting Do not bleach or tumble dry Wash dark colours separately Do not dry in direct sunlight Line dry in shade inside out Reshape garment to original condition when wet Stylish and comfortable, this white t-shirt with purple and black stripes is designed for the man of style. The bunches of thin white stripes alternating with two slightly thick black stripes adds a semi-formal stylish look to this tee. The cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day, while the purple lining along the plackets adds to the fashion statement. Team this with jeans and lifestyle shoes for that perfect look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
